Bearer.name: Authorization
Bearer.description: Enter your Bearer token in the format: Bearer <token>

get.summary: ListFormulas lists formulas with search, filter, and pagination.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (1-indexed, default 1, min 1).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Items per page (1-100, default 10).

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search query (searches in code, name, expression).

parameters.name: formulaType
parameters.description:
Filter by formula type.
FORMULA_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED (0) means "show all types" (no filter).

 - FORMULA_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Default unspecified value - used as "no filter" in list/export requests.
 - FORMULA_TYPE_CALCULATION: Mathematical calculation using parameter codes (e.g., "ELEC_CONSUMPTION * ELEC_RATE").
 - FORMULA_TYPE_SQL_QUERY: SQL query to fetch data from other tables.
 - FORMULA_TYPE_CONSTANT: Constant value (no calculation).

parameters.name: activeFilter
parameters.description:
Filter by active status.

 - ACTIVE_FILTER_UNSPECIFIED: Show all records regardless of active status (default).
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_ACTIVE: Show only active records.
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_INACTIVE: Show only inactive records.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort field: "code", "name", "type", "version", "created_at" (default: "code").

parameters.name: sortOrder
parameters.description: Sort order: "asc", "desc" (default: "asc").

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: CreateFormulaRequest is the request for creating a new formula.

get.summary: ExportFormulas exports formulas to Excel file.

parameters.name: formulaType
parameters.description:
Filter by formula type.

 - FORMULA_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Default unspecified value - used as "no filter" in list/export requests.
 - FORMULA_TYPE_CALCULATION: Mathematical calculation using parameter codes (e.g., "ELEC_CONSUMPTION * ELEC_RATE").
 - FORMULA_TYPE_SQL_QUERY: SQL query to fetch data from other tables.
 - FORMULA_TYPE_CONSTANT: Constant value (no calculation).

parameters.name: activeFilter
parameters.description:
Filter by active status.

 - ACTIVE_FILTER_UNSPECIFIED: Show all records regardless of active status (default).
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_ACTIVE: Show only active records.
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_INACTIVE: Show only inactive records.

post.summary: ImportFormulas imports formulas from Excel file.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: ImportFormulasRequest is the request for importing formulas from Excel.

get.summary: DownloadFormulaTemplate downloads the Excel import template.
GetFormula retrieves a formula by ID.

parameters.name: formulaId
parameters.description: Formula ID (UUID format).

parameters.name: formulaId
parameters.description: Formula ID to delete (UUID format).

put.summary:
UpdateFormula updates an existing formula.
Note: formula_code is immutable and cannot be changed.

parameters.name: formulaId
parameters.description: Formula ID to update (UUID format).

get.summary: ListParameters lists parameters with search, filter, and pagination.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (1-indexed, default 1, min 1).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Items per page (1-100, default 10).

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search query (searches in code, name, short_name).

parameters.name: dataType
parameters.description:
Filter by data type.
DATA_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED (0) means "show all data types" (no filter).

 - DATA_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Default unspecified value - used as "no filter" in list/export requests.
 - DATA_TYPE_NUMBER: Numeric values (integer or decimal).
 - DATA_TYPE_TEXT: Text/string values.
 - DATA_TYPE_BOOLEAN: Boolean (true/false) values.

parameters.name: paramCategory
parameters.description:
Filter by category.
PARAM_CATEGORY_UNSPECIFIED (0) means "show all categories" (no filter).

 - PARAM_CATEGORY_UNSPECIFIED: Default unspecified value - used as "no filter" in list/export requests.
 - PARAM_CATEGORY_INPUT: Input parameter - manually entered values.
 - PARAM_CATEGORY_RATE: Rate parameter - rate/ratio values.
 - PARAM_CATEGORY_CALCULATED: Calculated parameter - computed from other parameters.

parameters.name: activeFilter
parameters.description:
Filter by active status.
ACTIVE_FILTER_UNSPECIFIED (0) = show all, ACTIVE_FILTER_ACTIVE (1) = only active,
ACTIVE_FILTER_INACTIVE (2) = only inactive.

 - ACTIVE_FILTER_UNSPECIFIED: Show all records regardless of active status (default).
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_ACTIVE: Show only active records.
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_INACTIVE: Show only inactive records.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort field: "code", "name", "category", "data_type", "created_at" (default: "code").

parameters.name: sortOrder
parameters.description: Sort order: "asc", "desc" (default: "asc").

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: CreateParameterRequest is the request for creating a new parameter.

parameters.name: paramCategory

parameters.name: activeFilter

FormulaServiceUpdateFormulaBody.description:
UpdateFormulaRequest is the request for updating a formula.
Note: formula_code is immutable and cannot be changed after creation.

v1ActiveFilter.description:
ActiveFilter represents filter options for is_active field.

 - ACTIVE_FILTER_UNSPECIFIED: Show all records regardless of active status (default).
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_ACTIVE: Show only active records.
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_INACTIVE: Show only inactive records.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the record was created (ISO 8601).

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated (ISO 8601).

updatedBy.description: User who last updated the record.

validationErrors.description: List of validation errors if any.

isSuccess.description: Indicates if the operation was successful.

v1BaseResponse.description: BaseResponse is the standard response wrapper for all API responses.

formulaCode.description: Unique code (uppercase, alphanumeric with underscore, 1-50 chars).

inputParamIds.description: Input parameter IDs (at least 1 for CALCULATION type).

v1CreateFormulaRequest.description: CreateFormulaRequest is the request for creating a new formula.

v1CreateFormulaResponse.description: CreateFormulaResponse is the response for creating a formula.

v1DeleteFormulaResponse.description: DeleteFormulaResponse is the response for deleting a formula.

fileContent.description: Excel template file content as bytes (.xlsx format).

v1DownloadFormulaTemplateResponse.description: DownloadFormulaTemplateResponse is the response containing the template file.

fileContent.description: Excel file content as bytes (.xlsx format).

v1ExportFormulasResponse.description: ExportFormulasResponse is the response containing the Excel file.

expression.description: Expression text (e.g., "ELEC_CONSUMPTION * ELEC_RATE" or SQL query).

resultParamId.description: Result/output parameter ID (UUID FK to mst_parameter).

resultParamCode.description: Resolved result parameter code (read-only, from join).

resultParamName.description: Resolved result parameter name (read-only, from join).

v1Formula.description: Formula represents a master formula entity for costing calculations.

sortOrder.description: Display order of the parameter in the formula.

v1FormulaParam.description: FormulaParam represents an input parameter reference within a formula.

v1FormulaType.description:
FormulaType represents the type of a formula expression.

 - FORMULA_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Default unspecified value - used as "no filter" in list/export requests.
 - FORMULA_TYPE_CALCULATION: Mathematical calculation using parameter codes (e.g., "ELEC_CONSUMPTION * ELEC_RATE").
 - FORMULA_TYPE_SQL_QUERY: SQL query to fetch data from other tables.
 - FORMULA_TYPE_CONSTANT: Constant value (no calculation).

v1GetFormulaResponse.description: GetFormulaResponse is the response for getting a formula.

rowNumber.description: Row number in the Excel file.

v1ImportError.description: ImportError represents a single import error.

fileContent.description: Excel file content as bytes (.xlsx or .xls format).

v1ImportFormulasRequest.description: ImportFormulasRequest is the request for importing formulas from Excel.

skippedCount.description: Number of skipped records (duplicates with skip action).

updatedCount.description: Number of updated records (duplicates with update action).

v1ImportFormulasResponse.description: ImportFormulasResponse is the response for importing formulas.

v1ListFormulasResponse.description: ListFormulasResponse is the response for listing formulas.

totalItems.description: Total number of items across all pages.

v1PaginationResponse.description: PaginationResponse contains pagination metadata for list responses.

v1UpdateFormulaResponse.description: UpdateFormulaResponse is the response for updating a formula.

field.description: The field name that failed validation.

v1ValidationError.description: ValidationError represents a single field validation error.

paramName.description: New display name (optional, 1-200 chars if provided).

dataType.description: New data type (optional, cannot be UNSPECIFIED if provided).

paramCategory.description: New category (optional, cannot be UNSPECIFIED if provided).

uomId.description: New UOM reference (optional, UUID format, empty string to clear).

ParameterServiceUpdateParameterBody.description:
UpdateParameterRequest is the request for updating a parameter.
Note: param_code is immutable and cannot be changed after creation.

paramCode.description:
Unique code (uppercase, alphanumeric with underscore, 1-20 chars).
Must start with an uppercase letter. Immutable after creation.

uomId.description: Optional UOM reference (UUID format, empty string means no UOM).

v1CreateParameterRequest.description: CreateParameterRequest is the request for creating a new parameter.

v1CreateParameterResponse.description: CreateParameterResponse is the response for creating a parameter.

v1DataType.description:
DataType represents the data type of a parameter value.

 - DATA_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Default unspecified value - used as "no filter" in list/export requests.
 - DATA_TYPE_NUMBER: Numeric values (integer or decimal).
 - DATA_TYPE_TEXT: Text/string values.
 - DATA_TYPE_BOOLEAN: Boolean (true/false) values.

v1DeleteParameterResponse.description: DeleteParameterResponse is the response for deleting a parameter.

fileContent.description: Excel template file content as bytes (.xlsx format).

v1DownloadParameterTemplateResponse.description: DownloadParameterTemplateResponse is the response containing the template file.

v1ExportParametersResponse.description: ExportParametersResponse is the response containing the Excel file.

v1GetParameterResponse.description: GetParameterResponse is the response for getting a parameter.

fileContent.description: Excel file content as bytes (.xlsx or .xls format).

v1ImportParametersRequest.description: ImportParametersRequest is the request for importing parameters from Excel.

skippedCount.description: Number of skipped records (duplicates with skip action).

updatedCount.description: Number of updated records (duplicates with update action).

v1ImportParametersResponse.description: ImportParametersResponse is the response for importing parameters.

v1ListParametersResponse.description: ListParametersResponse is the response for listing parameters.

v1ParamCategory.description:
ParamCategory represents the category/purpose of a parameter.

 - PARAM_CATEGORY_UNSPECIFIED: Default unspecified value - used as "no filter" in list/export requests.
 - PARAM_CATEGORY_INPUT: Input parameter - manually entered values.
 - PARAM_CATEGORY_RATE: Rate parameter - rate/ratio values.
 - PARAM_CATEGORY_CALCULATED: Calculated parameter - computed from other parameters.

dataType.description: Data type of the parameter value.

defaultValue.description: Default value (decimal, as string for precision).

minValue.description: Minimum allowed value (decimal, as string for precision).

maxValue.description: Maximum allowed value (decimal, as string for precision).

uomCode.description: Resolved UOM code (read-only, populated from mst_uom join).

uomName.description: Resolved UOM name (read-only, populated from mst_uom join).

v1Parameter.description: Parameter represents a master parameter entity for costing calculations.

v1UpdateParameterResponse.description: UpdateParameterResponse is the response for updating a parameter.

categoryName.description: New display name (optional, 1-100 chars if provided).
